Code: public int centeredAverage(int[] nums){java.util.Arrays.sort(nums);int sum=0;for(int i=1;i<nums.length-1;i++){sum+=nums[i];}return sum/(nums.length-2);}
public int dateFashion(int you, int date){if(you>=8||date>=8)return 2;if(you<=2||date<=2)return 0;return 1;}
public int sum3(int[] nums) { return nums[0] + nums[1] + nums[2]; }
